name: Umm Al Quwain (United Arab Emirates)

colors.symbolism: the hoist band and the central crescent and star

description: A red field with a vertical white band along the hoist and a white crescent enclosing a five-pointed star at the centre of the red portion.
history: Umm Al Quwain, the second-smallest of the seven emirates of the United Arab Emirates, retained its red-and-white emirate flag after federation in 1971. The crescent and star recall the flag's Islamic and historical Trucial States associations.
